event.description: First Mars-native crop cycle exceeds all projections

subsim_log.sexpr:
(let ((food 1.84)
              (water 1.52)
              (pop 7)
              (crisis 0.22))
          (if (> crisis 0.5)
            (list "ration" (* food 0.8) (* water 0.7))
            (if (> food 1.5)
              (list "expand" (+ pop 2) food)
              (list "maintain" pop food))))

Year 77 — Frost Nakamura (water)
Mood: anxious. Event: First Mars-native crop cycle exceeds all projections.
Action: explore. Colony morale: strained.
